name: slack
description: Slack skills for building apps with the Slack CLI, Bolt, Web API, and Block Kit

interface.shortDescription: Slack skills for your AI tools
interface.longDescription: Skills for building Slack apps with the Slack CLI and Bolt, calling Web API methods, and composing Block Kit layouts, plus skills for searching and messaging in Slack when a Slack MCP server is connected.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me build a Slack app with the Slack CLI and Bolt.
